category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a terminal-based text editor; official Micro site calls it a modern and intuitive terminal-based text editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is micro; official site hero uses the lowercase name micro.
docs_sources: Official Micro website gives overview, installation, and feature documentation; official GitHub README provides documentation and help pointers.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/zyedidia/micro; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists micro; official website describes terminal editing, customization, colors, highlighting, and language support; GitHub topics include go, terminal, command-line, and text-editor.
